prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HTSSS-5PC-SML-GRY-2 Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 5pc Universal Tweezer Set Stainless Steel, 5" Description: This 5pc tweezer set is useful for a variety of applications.

These stainless steel tweezers are all between 4" and 5" and feature different tips for different uses. The shovel tip on the stamp tweezers is perfect for handling flat broad objects that may be too delicate for pointed tweezers. The bent tip tweezers are designed for grasping small stones and components, while the solder/utility tweezers are ideal for holding small wires in place.

Having 5 different tweezers makes this set quite versatile, as there is one for any situation. Whether you're beading, soldering, repairing watches or jewelry, or even simply removing a splinter, there is a tweezer in this set for you. Search Terms: jewelry repair watch tools electronics Features: - Set includes: sharp point tweezers (4.5"), stamp tweezers (4.75"), general tweezers (4"), solder/utility tweezers (4.5"), bent tip tweezers (4.5") - Lengths between 4" - 5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 5-pk 5in Universal Tweezer Set Stainless Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4-5 Inch, Multiple Tip Types, Jewelry Repair, Watch Repair, Soldering, Precision Handling

openai.title_differentiation: Sharp Point, Bent Tip, Shovel Tip, Solder Utility, Watch Repair, Jewelry Repair, Electronics, Fine Parts Handling
